meaning: n.保证物,赔偿物,赔款,补偿,保证
examples: Political exiles had not been given indemnity from prosecution.
I was also given an indemnity form, which I duly completed and returned.
Using letter of indemnity to obtain a clean B/L is a common practice.
IRS-CI started an undercover operation whereby its agents posed as the owners of Continental Indemnity, Ltd.
Under the pact England renounced its claims to French territory in return for an indemnity.
